text:
Created attachment 242959
Patch for ticcutils

* Use upstream release archive as suggested by Porters Handbook
* Drop unnecessary additional CFLAG
* Move static patch to post-patch section

Compile and tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (aarch64)
